# Stefano D'Ambrosio — Portfolio

> Front End Developer building modern web experiences.

## About

Full-stack developer specializing in Astro, React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. Based in Italy, working freelance.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Stedamb
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ste-damb
- Email: stedamb@gmail.com

## Projects

- **AnimaNoire Tattoo Atelier** — Website for a tattoo shop built with Astro and Sanity CMS.
  - Demo: http://animanoire.it
  - Source: https://github.com/Stedamb/AnimaNoire/tree/astro-sanity

- **Next Blog** — Personal blog built with Next.js and Sanity CMS.
  - Demo: http://stedamb.vercel.app
  - Source: https://github.com/Stedamb/next-blog

- **Video Portfolio** — Video portfolio built with Astro.
  - Demo: http://video-journal.vercel.app
  - Source: https://github.com/Stedamb/Videomaker-portfolio/tree/dev

## Tech Stack

Astro, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Motion, Node.js, Sanity CMS, Supabase
